items.markdown:
Himalayan salt tiles are `a popular choice for creating illuminated accent walls in homes, spas, and saunas` . These hand-cut tiles, typically 8"×4"×1", release negative ions when warmed, which can help **purify the air** and create a calming, mineral-rich atmosphere.[[1]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20walls%20are%20touted,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8678970336007433490,catalogid:3733075406373319262,gpcid:14984007211196227176,mid:576462880002988438&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.ittefaqsalt.com/salt-wall-construction/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20wall%20construction%20is,into%20salt%20bricks%20and%20tiles.)[[4]](https://yourbodyneeds.com/blogs/news/benefits-of-himalayan-salt-therapy#:~:text=Himalayan%20salts%20emit%20negative%20ions,to%20a%20cleaner%2C%20healthier%20environment.)

Design & Installation Ideas

- **Backlit Accents:** Using LED string lights behind the tiles enhances their natural pink and amber tones, creating a soothing "salt cave" glow.
- **Complete Kits:** For DIY projects, kits often include bricks, specialized Saltite adhesive , and lighting.
- **Wellness Spaces:** They are frequently used in yoga studios and meditation rooms to support relaxation and respiratory health.
- **Durability:** While durable, these walls should be kept dry and used in well-ventilated areas to prevent the salt from "sweating" in high humidity.[[1]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20walls%20are%20touted,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8678970336007433490,catalogid:3733075406373319262,gpcid:14984007211196227176,mid:576462880002988438&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Salt-Tiles-8x4x1-Walls/dp/B0FCVKZR79#:~:text=About%20this%20Item,wall%20or%20room%20to%20life.)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:16904697359685885576&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.ebay.com/itm/316542743378#:~:text=Item%20description%20from%20the%20seller,Size:%2010%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Tiles)[[6]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=If%20you%20keep%20it%20dry,doesn't%20rot%20or%20decay.)[[7]](https://saltpur.co.za/how-long-does-a-himalayan-salt-block-last/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20blocks%20can%20last%20for%20years%2C%20but%20it%20is,can%20cause%20it%20to%20deteriorate.)

Are you planning to install this in a **standard room** or a **high-humidity environment** like a sauna?
